overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game featuring a character in a long coat exploring a dimly lit wooden interior. The character moves through a rustic main hall with a stone fireplace, ascends a wooden staircase, explores an upstairs bedroom with red curtains, and returns to the main floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic main hall with stone fireplace

events.description: character turns right toward the wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: walking across the main hall away from the fireplace, surveying the dimly lit room

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire on the right side of the room
upholstered red armchair near a floor lamp
wooden staircase with banister leading to upper floor
iron chandelier hanging from wooden ceiling beams
large ornate rug with geometric patterns covering the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a warm stone fireplace in a dimly lit wooden hall. They walk across the room past a red leather armchair and ornate rugs, turning toward a wooden staircase visible on the right side of the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase ascending to upper floor

events.description: character enters the narrow wooden stairwell from the main hall
lighting dims as character moves into the darker upper stairwell

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden staircase toward the upper floor

entered.detail: decorative wooden post at the base of the stair railing
vertical wooden planks lining the narrow stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow wooden stairwell, leaving the main hall behind. They ascend the creaking stairs as the environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with wooden walls pressing in on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: attic bedroom with sloped wooden ceiling

events.description: character enters the upstairs bedroom from the stairwell
character stops near the bed and looks around the room

agents.ego_description: exploring the attic bedroom, walking around the canopy bed and examining furniture

entered.detail: wooden bed with red curtains and canopy against the far wall
heavy red drapes framing the bed and windows
long wooden dresser with multiple drawers along the left wall
small wooden table next to the bed
trunk or storage chest at the foot of the bed

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the character enters a cozy attic bedroom with sloped wooden ceilings. A canopy bed with red curtains dominates the space. The character walks around the bed, examining the wooden dresser and chest before turning back toward the stairs.

events.description: character turns and begins descending the staircase
character exits stairwell and re-enters the main hall

agents.ego_description: walking back down the wooden staircase toward the main floor

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the bedroom and descends the narrow wooden staircase. The lighting remains dim as they navigate the steps downward, transitioning from the upper floor back toward the main hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: main hall near fireplace and coat rack

events.description: character turns toward the coat rack near the wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the main hall toward the coat rack and fireplace area

entered.detail: wooden stand with hanging coats and garments against the wall
large stone fireplace now visible from the opposite side

segments.scene_description: Back on the main floor, the character walks toward a coat rack and the stone fireplace, now approaching from a different angle. They move past wooden shelves and furniture, completing their circuit of the ground floor room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that travels from a warm, open hall up into a secluded attic bedroom before returning to the ground floor. It begins near a glowing stone fireplace in a dimly lit wooden hall, moving past a red leather armchair and ornate rugs toward a staircase on the right. As the character ascends the narrow stairwell, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with wooden walls pressing in before finally opening into a cozy attic bedroom with sloped ceilings and a canopy bed draped in red curtains. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from a wooden dresser and descends the creaking stairs, transitioning from the upper floor back into the dim light of the main level. Finally, the camera completes the circuit by moving past wooden shelves and furniture to approach the stone fireplace from a new angle.
